data.title: Atai Life Sciences says Srinivas Rao assumes role of sole CEO
data.description:
• Atai Life Sciences (NASDAQ:ATAI) on Friday announced that Srinivas Rao has assumed the role of sole Chief Executive Officer.
  • The company also promoted Kevin Craig to Chief Medical Officer, Glenn Short to Chief Scientific Officer and the appointment of Gerd Kochendoerfer as Chief Operating Officer.
  • As announced in May 2024, Co-Founder Srinivas Rao, was promoted to Co-CEO effective June 1, 2024, and assumed the role of CEO on January 1, 2025. Rao previously held the titles of Chief Scientific, Medical, and Executive Officer at companies ranging from venture-backed startups to vertically integrated, publicly traded pharmaceutical companies.
  • ATAI +1.23% premarket to $1.64.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: IonQ CEO says 2024 at 'high end' of bookings, predicts $1B in revenue by 2030
data.description:
IonQ (NYSE:IONQ) Chairman and CEO Peter Chapman issued an update on Friday and said he expects bookings for the quantum computing company to be at the "high end" of its forecast, and forecast revenue could approach $1B by 2030.

Shares rose 7% in premarket trading, while other quantum stocks, such as Rigetti Computing (RGTI), Quantum Computing (QUBT) and D-Wave Quantum (QBTS) were also higher.

"We anticipate that 2024 results will be at the high end of our bookings and revenue guidance and are extremely excited about 2025," Chapman said in a statement. "We believe that IonQ will be profitable, with sales approaching $1 billion, by 2030."

Separately, on Friday, D-Wave said 2024 bookings would rise approximately 120% year-over-year over 2023 levels.

Quantum update

Chapman also gave an update on the state of quantum computing itself, after Nvidia (NVDA) Chief Executive Jensen Huang said earlier this week that "very useful" quantum computers are around 20 years away and sent stocks in the industry tumbling.

"One of the areas facing the most significant potential disruption is strong AI, where we believe natively quantum AI will outperform classical AI," Chapman explained. "Prudent leaders invest in things that have the potential for near-term returns."

By the end of 2023, investment in quantum had reached $50B, Chapman added, citing data provided by consulting firm McKinsey.

He also noted that companies like Nvidia, as well as Amazon, Google, IBM and Microsoft are already investing and hiring in quantum computing.

data.title: Immunocore reports cash, equivalents of $820M as of December 31
data.description:
• Immunocore (NASDAQ:IMCR) said its preliminary unaudited cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities were ~$820 million as of December 31.
  • The firm said in Q4, it prepaid in full the loan outstanding under the Pharmakon loan agreement and also paid sales-related rebate accruals.

data.title: DataMetrex receives new P.O. for $440K
data.description:
• Datametrex AI (OTCPK:DTMXF) on Friday said its wholly owned subsidiary, Datametrex Korea, received a new Purchase Order (P.O.) of about $440K with projected gross profit of about 33%, on December 30, 2024.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Vortex Metals announces non-brokered private placement
data.description:
• Vortex Metals (TSXV:VMS:CA) on Friday announced a non-brokered private placement for gross proceeds of up to $1M comprising 12.5M units at a price of $0.08 per unit.
  • Each unit will consist of one common share in the capital of the company and one-half of one common share purchase warrant. Each Warrant will be exercisable into one common share at a price of $0.12 per warrant for a period of two years from the date of issuance.
  • The company intends to use the proceeds for exploration activities at the company's Illapel Copper Project in Chile and for general working capital purposes.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Walgreens Boots Alliance in Charts: Retail Pharmacy sales hit an all-time high in FQ1
Pfizer’s bladder cancer treatment achieves main goal in late-stage trial
data.description:
• Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) said on Friday it achieved main goal in late-stage trial evaluating sasanlimab in combination with Bacillus Calmette-Guérin as induction therapy with or without maintenance in patients with BCG-naïve, high-risk non-muscle invasive bladder cancer.
  • The study demonstrated a clinically meaningful and statistically significant improvement with sasanlimab in combination with BCG as compared to BCG alone.
  • The overall safety profile of sasanlimab in combination with BCG was generally consistent with the known profile of BCG and data reported from clinical trials with sasanlimab.
  • The profile of sasanlimab was also generally consistent with the reported safety profile of PD-1 inhibitors.
  • Sasanlimab also continues to be investigated in combination with Pfizer’s antibody drug conjugate portfolio in advanced solid tumors.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Net Lease Office Properties sells five sites for $43M, pays off secured mortgage
data.description:
Net Lease Office Properties (NYSE:NLOP) sold five office properties in November and December for gross proceeds of $43.3M, the REIT said on Friday.

Net proceeds were used to repay ~$30M of J.P. Morgan's senior secured mortgage and ~$5M on its mezzanine loans. Along with ~$23M of funds from other sources, NLOP paid the the senior secured mortgage in full and has an outstanding balance of ~$61M on its mezzanine loan as of Dec. 31, 2024.

Office property sales during Q4 brought total gross proceeds from dispositions completed in 2024 to ~$364M, including occupied sales of $319M at a weighted-average disposition cap rate of ~10.5%.

As of Dec. 31, 2024, Net Lease Office Properties (NYSE:NLOP) owned 39 office properties, comprising 37 properties in the U.S. and two in Europe.

Shares in Net Lease Office (NLOP) slipped 1.3% in Friday premarket trading.

data.title: EnviroGold Global upsizes its unit offering to up to C$4M
data.description:
• EnviroGold Global (OTC:ESGLF) has increased the size of its previously announced non-brokered private placement financing due to increased investor interest, to raise up to C$4M of gross proceeds, consisting of up to 4,000 units issued at a price of C$1,000/Unit.
  • Each Unit will consist of C$1,000 principal amounts of unsecured convertible notes and 11,112 common share purchase warrants of the Co.
  • All other terms of the Financing remain as set out in the Co.’s December 19, 2024 news release.

data.title: Tilray Brands in charts: Cannabis and Beverage businesses show sequential growth in FQ2
